format.raw: id=firewall time=$DATE fw=$FIREWALL_IP pri=6 msg=session created $SRC_IP$SRC_PORT-$DST_IP$DST_PORT icmp $SRC_IP$SRC_PORT-$DST_IP$DST_PORT NA NA NA NA 1 3000 vpn trust $SESSION_ID NANA st0.0 UNKNOWN UNKNOWN UNKNOWN

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value" arr_length="5">
    <Field position="0"  name="msg" />
    <Field position="1"  name="firewall_ip"   org_name="fw" />
    <Field position="2"  name="severity"      org_name="pri" />
    <Field position="3"  name="type"          org_name="id" />
    <Field position="4"  name="event_time"    org_name="time" />
    <Field position="5"  name="vendor"        convert_tag="[[@set('junipernetworks')]]" />
    <Field position="6"  name="model"         convert_tag="[[@set('srx')]]" />
    <Field position="7"  name="logtype"       convert_tag="[[@set('session')]]" />
    <Field position="8"  name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="9"  name="original_log"  convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="10" name="eqp_type"      convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
    <Field position="11" name="parser_info"   convert_tag="[[@set('[Juniper]_srx_traffic_v1_keyvalue')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
